notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the unbound SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.6. It addresses 15 CVEs: CVE-2025-5994, CVE-2024-8508, CVE-2025-11411, CVE-2026-42944, CVE-2026-42959, and 10 more.
